name: First Tracks Biotherapeutics, Inc.
business: First Tracks Biotherapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing innovative immunology therapeutics for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. Its wholly owned pipeline includes rosnilimab for rheumatoid arthritis, ANB033 for celiac disease and eosinophilic esophagitis, and ANB101 for systemic lupus erythematosus. The company targets patient populations in therapeutic areas such as gastroenterology, rheumatology, dermatology, and respiratory.
sellsTo: Patients with autoimmune and inflammatory diseases
Physicians and healthcare providers in rheumatology, gastroenterology, dermatology, respiratory

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on delivering innovative immunology therapeutics for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases.

catalysts.event: Update on Phase 3 advancement of rosnilimab for rheumatoid arthritis
catalysts.sentence: We expect to provide an update on Phase 3 advancement in the first half of 2026.
